title: Arthur Cameron - Rectangular Wicker Storage Basket with Handles - 29 x 25 x 15 cm - Small Wicker Basket, Bathroom Storage Organiser, Bedroom Storage (Antique Wash)
features: 〚HANDCRAFTED EXCELLENCE〛: Meticulously woven by skilled artisans in northern China using traditional techniques, this wicker storage basket is made from full-round willow for exceptional durability and a sturdy, long-lasting finish.

〚FUNCTIONAL STORAGE BASKET WITH HANDLES〛: With built-in handles for easy portability, this wicker basket combines practicality and elegance, making it perfect for any room. Use it in the bathroom for toiletries, in the bedroom for accessories, or in the kitchen for utensils—its versatile design keeps spaces organized and stylish.

〚UNIQUE & AUTHENTIC〛: Every organiser basket is uniquely crafted, featuring slight variations in weave, size, and colour that celebrate the natural charm of the materials and the artisan's expertise. These nuances underscore the product's authenticity and individuality, ensuring each piece is truly one-of-a-kind. No two wicker storage baskets are identical, making every creation a special reflection of handmade artistry.

〚COLOUR OPTIONS〛: Available in brush white, distilled brown, natural, and antique wash finishes, this storage basket suits a variety of decor styles. Brush white fits modern or minimalist spaces, distilled brown complements rustic or farmhouse themes, natural blends with boho or coastal styles, and antique wash adds vintage charm to shabby-chic or eclectic interiors.

〚APPROXIMATE MEASUREMENTS〛: The basket measures approximately 29cm in width, 25cm in depth, and 15cm in height, with slight variations due to its handmade nature. Colours may also vary slightly due to screen settings and lighting conditions during photography
description: Product Description Rectangular Wicker Baskets & Shallow Storage Trays These beautifully handwoven wicker trays add a touch of natural elegance to any space. Crafted with care, each piece features subtle variations that enhance its unique charm. Designed for both style and function, they offer a versatile solution for serving , organising , or displaying treasured items . Functional Organiser Basket Ideal for organising loose items, this storage tray serves as a practical solution for the bathroom , bedroom , living room or just as general storage. Tidy and Stylish Coffee Table This wicker basket offers a refined coffee table storage solution , effortlessly keeping everyday essentials in place while adding a touch of elegance. Stylish & Versatile Storage This shallow wicker tray blends style and practicality, making it perfect for organising essentials or elegantly displaying decorative items . Versatile Colour Choices Offered in Antique Wash , Natural , Distilled Brown , and Whitewash, these organiser baskets seamlessly fit into both rustic and modern spaces. One of a Kind: Hand-Crafted Wicker Charm Each hand-crafted piece carries its own unique character, shaped by the natural materials and the artisan’s touch. Skilled artisans in Northern China employ age-old traditional weaving techniques to create these unique storage trays. Slight differences in size, weave, and colour are to be expected, reflecting the individuality of every item. These subtle variations, far from being flaws, enhance the charm and authenticity of each product, making each tray a one-of-a-kind piece. Previous page Four-Size Shallow Wicker Trays Shallow wicker trays come in four sizes: XS, S, M & L , while rectangular wicker baskets are one-size Storage Baskets with Built-In Handles Integrated handles on the wicker basket make it easy to lift, carry, and reposition as needed Organised Play: Wicker Trays for Children's Toys Playroom Perfection : Perfect for organising toys and keeping play areas tidy and accessible. Next page 1 Multiple Size Options 2 Handled Wicker Baskets 3 Kid-Friendly Storage Arthur Cameron Wicker Products Comparison Rectangular Wicker Basket Buying Options Waste Paper Bin / Planter Buying Options Lined Wicker Hamper Buying Options Round Wicker Log Basket Buying Options Lightweight Wicker Trunk Buying Options Lined Gift Hamper Buying Options Lucca Deluxe Large Trunk Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 185 4.4 out of 5 stars 71 — 4.6 out of 5 stars 135 4.4 out of 5 stars 120 4.6 out of 5 stars 96 4.0 out of 5 stars 24 Price £10.99 £ 10 . 99 — — — — £6.99 £ 6 . 99 — Basket Liner ✘ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✘ ✔ ✘ Built in Handles ✔ ✘ ✘ ✔ ✔ ✘ ✔ Hinged Lid ✘ ✘ ✔ ✘ ✔ ✘ ✔ Colours Available 4 4 5 3 4 5 2 Different Sizes One Size L, M & S L, M, S & XS L, M & S XL, L & M One Size XL & L Largest Size 29 x 25 x 15 cm 38 x 30 cm 58 x 43 x 35 cm 52 x 48 cm 90 x 52 x 56 cm 30 x 20 x 15 cm 88 x 48 x 49 cm Smallest Size N/A 22 x 20 cm 38 x 22 x 22 cm 42 x 35 cm 70 x 38 x 42 cm N/A 80 x 40 x 41 cm What is wicker? Wicker refers to the craftsmanship and weaving technique, not the material itself. The weaving can be done using various natural materials, including cane, rattan, willow, seagrass, water hyacinth, and many other types of plant fibers. What is this basket made of? This basket is made from willow, a naturally smooth and pliable material. Its softness and flexibility make it ideal for crafting baskets and trays in a variety of shapes and sizes, allowing for both sturdy construction and intricate weaving. What is the difference between Rattan and Willow? Rattan is typically a rougher material that requires steaming before it can be twisted and shaped. In contrast, willow baskets are made using the whole willow branch, resulting in a naturally glossy finish that adds to their smooth, refined look. Why are the listed sizes approximate? Each piece is artisan-made, so slight variations in size and weave are to be expected. These differences add to the one-of-a-kind charm and authenticity of the product. Will the product look exactly the same as in the listing photo? Colours may vary due to monitor settings and lighting during photography. The weave can differ slightly from piece to piece because each item is hand-crafted. We strive for accuracy, but natural variations are part of what makes each product unique.
